headline: P&L exposure: ₹20 Cr direct remediation + ₹13.8 Cr regulatory, operational, and revenue risk (computed via β elasticities)
what_matters: Child labor risk is transmitted via Tier 2/3 coal suppliers in Jharkhand, requiring supplier audits, remediation, and possible substitution.
P/E compression of 0.1x expected as direct and indirect costs (₹33.8 Cr) erode margins and revenue at risk includes ₹2.5 Cr from potential customer/procurement exclusion.
BRSR Principle 5 and GRI 408 triggered; SEBI may impose penalties of ₹10-50 Cr per violation; mandatory disclosure deadlines and risk of trading restrictions.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹20 Cr direct remediation + ₹13.8 Cr regulatory, operational, and revenue risk (computed via β elasticities)
Revenue at risk: ₹2.5 Cr from potential procurement exclusion
